functions.name: qwc_services_core.api.create_model
documentation:
Helper for creating api models with ordered fields

:param flask_restx.Api api: Flask-RESTX Api object
:param str name: Model name
:param list fields: List of tuples containing ['field name', <type>]

classes.name: qwc_services_core.api.Api

methods.name: qwc_services_core.api.Api.create_model
documentation:
Helper for creating api models with ordered fields

:param str name: Model name
:param list fields: List of tuples containing ['field name', <type>]

Custom Flask-RESTPlus Api subclass for overriding default root route

NOTE: endpoint of route '/' must be named 'root':

```
>>> @api.route('/', endpoint='root')
```

see also <https://github.com/noirbizarre/flask-restplus/issues/247>

documentation: Constructor

methods.name: qwc_services_core.cache.ExpiringDict.set
documentation:
Store value under key until expiry.

:param str key: Key for value
:param obj value: Value to store
:param int duration: Time in seconds until expiry (default: 300s)

methods.name: qwc_services_core.cache.ExpiringDict.lookup
documentation:
Return dict with value or None if not present or expired.

:param str key: Key for value

Returns {'value': <value>} or None
Dict for values where each key will expire after some time.

documentation:
Return collected list of resource permissions for identity roles.

PermissionsReader helper class

Read users, groups, roles and permissions for a tenant from a JSON file.
Provides helper methods for collectiong permissions.
